reviews.review_description: REALLY LIKE THIS GAME! Stuck on the piano, cant get past it. What could I possibly be missing. Is there a guide to help when you get stuck in some of the areas?

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much! We're really happy to hear you're enjoying the game.

We’re currently working on an in-game hint system to help players when they get stuck, including puzzles like the piano.

In the meantime, feel free to email us at solve@midnightwitness.com and we’ll be happy to send you hints or guidance for any part of the game.

Thanks again for playing and supporting Midnight Witness!

reviews.review_title: this is something different lets speak
reviews.review_description:
yep just questioning the suspect's by voice great no typing and i have to say i switched to dutch the sentences were will constructed not a google translate the only think is i'm living in Belgium and this is dutch used in the Nederlands yup a little difference's like i think all the english version we have us uk ...
so add Dutch from Belgium like i will love it more

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your rating and for taking the time to share your feedback we truly appreciate it!
We’re really glad you enjoyed the voice-based questioning and noticed the care we put into the Dutch translations 🇳🇱. And yes, you’re absolutely right — there are meaningful differences between Dutch from the Netherlands and the Flemish Dutch spoken in Belgium. Thanks for pointing that out!
We’ll definitely keep your suggestion in mind and look into adding a Belgian Dutch version in future updates. It’s important to us that the experience feels as authentic and local as possible 

Thanks again for playing and for being part of this journey with us!

P.S. If we ever add a voice saying “ja, meneer” with a Belgian accent… we’ll dedicate that line to you 😄

reviews.review_title: Cannot play. Keeps crashing all the time
reviews.review_description: The game is really interesting. It has good dialogues and suspicious  characters. The problem is the game keeps crashing all the time. I cannot ask more than two questions without the game crashing on me. Why would the devs launch a game like this? It is not worth a penny at this time. ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi! We're really sorry to hear that the game is crashing for you — that’s definitely not the experience we want you to have. Thank you so much for your kind words about the story and characters; we truly appreciate your support and feedback. 💙

We’re currently investigating the crashes and working on a fix as quickly as possible. If you'd like to help us resolve this faster, please feel free to send us a message at fun@monoku.com with your device model and a quick description of when the crash happens (for example, which scene or question). That would be a huge help!

Thanks again for giving Midnight’s Silent Witness a try — we’re on it! 🔍✨

reviews.review_description: Why was the entire products description in English, including the title, but the whole game is in Spanish? Very disappointing.

developer_response.body: Hi, we had a small bug but the game has been available in English for a long time now! Please let us know if you have any further issues. Do you know who is guilty already?
